description: Dark matter and dark energy - evidence, candidates, alternatives.

facts.context: Dark matter evidence from galaxy rotation curves shows:
facts.truth: stars orbit faster than visible mass predicts
distractors: stars orbit slower than expected from observations
rotation curves match visible matter perfectly
galaxies do not rotate at all detectably

facts.truth: bends light more than visible mass accounts for
distractors: is exactly predicted by visible matter alone
has never been observed in any system
bends light less than visible matter predicts

facts.truth: not been detected despite extensive searches
distractors: been definitively confirmed at particle colliders
been completely ruled out by all experiments
been directly observed in cosmic ray detectors

facts.truth: are very light and weakly interacting
distractors: are heavy particles like WIMPs
have already been detected in labs
were invented specifically for dark matter

facts.context: Modified gravity (MOND) as dark matter alternative:
facts.truth: explains galaxies but fails for galaxy clusters
distractors: explains all dark matter observations perfectly
has been definitively disproven by all tests
makes identical predictions to dark matter

facts.context: Dark energy causes the universe to:
distractors: contract and eventually collapse inward
expand at a constant unchanging rate
stop expanding and remain static

facts.context: The cosmological constant problem is that:
facts.truth: calculated vacuum energy is 10^120 times larger than observed
distractors: theory matches observation perfectly
the discrepancy is only a factor of two
vacuum energy cannot be calculated theoretically

facts.context: CMB observations constrain dark matter by:
facts.truth: showing its gravitational effects on early universe
distractors: directly detecting dark matter particles
proving dark matter does not exist at all
being completely insensitive to dark matter

facts.context: The Bullet Cluster provides dark matter evidence because:
facts.truth: lensing mass offset from visible gas
distractors: the system demonstrates complete absence of any dark matter component whatsoever
all gravitational observations perfectly match modified Newtonian dynamics predictions
visible baryonic matter and gravitational mass remain completely spatially coincident

facts.context: Primordial black holes as dark matter:
facts.truth: are constrained but not ruled out in some mass ranges
distractors: have been confirmed as the dark matter
are completely ruled out by all observations
cannot form in the early universe physics

facts.context: Quintessence models of dark energy propose:
facts.truth: dynamical field instead of constant vacuum energy
distractors: dark energy is exactly a cosmological constant
dark energy does not exist at all
dark energy has been directly detected

facts.context: Direct dark matter detection experiments search for:
facts.truth: rare nuclear recoils from dark matter scattering
distractors: dark matter production in particle colliders
gravitational effects on detector apparatus
electromagnetic radiation from dark matter
